use std::collections::HashMap; // Count word frequencies fn word_counts(text: &str) -> HashMap<&str, u32> { let mut counts = HashMap::new(); for word in text.split_whitespace() { *counts.entry(word).or_insert(0) += 1; } counts } // Longest slice (explicit lifetime) fn longest<'a>(x: &'a str, y: &'a str) -> &'a str { if x.len() >= y.len() { x } else { y } } fn main() { let counts = word_counts("a b a c a"); /* prints 3 for "a" */ println!("{}", counts["a"]); }
